2020

  1. Ravindra, Smith, and Tiwary, “Automatic mutual information noise omission (AMINO): generating order parameters for molecular systems”, Mol. Sys. Des. Engg. [Link]

  2. Smith, Ravindra, Wang, Cooley, and Tiwary, “Discovering loop conformational flexibility in T4 lysozyme mutants through artificial intelligence aided molecular dynamics”, J. Phys. Chem. [Link]
